name: Interpretation review for revised partial reprogramming bundle
summary: The revised wording is materially tighter, but the prominence and phrasing of conceptual promise still needs curator judgment before approval.

findings.claim_or_issue: Conceptual promise is still prominent enough that the public note may read as more imminent than the evidence supports.
findings.why_it_matters: This is the kind of wording drift that turns a careful tracker into an overconfident forecast surface.
findings.recommended_action: Have the curator decide whether the revised first sentence is strong enough or whether the promise framing should be trimmed again.
